fields.label: Date display override
fields.name: class_date_display
fields.instructions: Optional. If set, used verbatim in the schedule table instead of the formatted Class date (e.g. "Apr 28, 2026").

fields.label: Time (display string)
fields.name: class_time
fields.instructions: Free-form time, e.g. "7:30 AM – 6:30 PM".

fields.label: Tuition price (numeric)
fields.name: price
fields.instructions: Optional. If empty, "Request pricing" is shown.

fields.label: Tuition display override
fields.name: tuition_display
fields.instructions: Optional. Overrides the formatted price (e.g. "Request pricing", "$795 / seat").

fields.label: Request-pricing modal class label
fields.name: request_class_label
fields.instructions: Optional. Falls back to the post title. Used as data-class on the table button.

fields.label: Hero image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Optional. Background image for the navy hero. Falls back to the featured image, then the default page hero background.

fields.label: Hero intro paragraphs
fields.name: hero_intro
fields.instructions: Optional. One or two short paragraphs shown in white under the class title. Falls back to the post excerpt or content.

fields.label: Pricing alert label
fields.name: pricing_label
fields.instructions: Optional. Orange uppercase label in the pricing band. Defaults to "Pricing available on request."

fields.label: Pricing alert supporting text
fields.name: pricing_note
fields.instructions: Optional. Dark supporting text under the pricing label. Has a sensible default if empty.

fields.label: Class info panel heading
fields.name: info_heading
fields.instructions: Optional. Uppercase navy heading for the schedule panel. Falls back to the post title.

fields.label: Schedule rows
fields.name: schedule_rows
fields.instructions: Optional. One row per session (e.g. Day 1, Day 2). If empty, a single row is built from Class date / Time.

fields.label: Topics covered
fields.name: topics_covered
fields.instructions: Optional. Use a bulleted list. Shown in the lower-left info block.

fields.label: Designations
fields.name: designations
fields.instructions: Optional. Certifications / designations earned. Falls back to the class categories.

fields.label: What to bring
fields.name: what_to_bring
fields.instructions: Optional. Use a bulleted list.

fields.label: Accommodations
fields.name: accommodations
fields.instructions: Optional. Accessibility / accommodation notes.

fields.label: Final CTA heading
fields.name: cta_heading
fields.instructions: Optional. Defaults to "We will travel to you!"

fields.label: Final CTA text
fields.name: cta_text
fields.instructions: Optional. Paragraph in the closing CTA. Has a default if empty.

fields.label: Final CTA button label
fields.name: cta_button_label
fields.instructions: Optional. Defaults to "Contact Us".

fields.label: Final CTA button URL
fields.name: cta_button_url
fields.instructions: Optional. Defaults to the site Contact page.

fields.label: Final CTA image
fields.name: cta_image
fields.instructions: Optional. Image for the closing CTA section.
